title: Structure Swooper Catalog Source Index
forbids: Swooper catalog source index source data or reader drifting away from the maps source owner
why: Packet 4 makes Swooper Maps catalog membership explicit source data before Studio launch-source resolution consumes catalog source ids.
remediate: Keep the tracked catalog source index and reader in mods/mod-swooper-maps/src/maps.
message: Swooper catalog source index topology drifted.
